creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Version 3.14.0 has been released.


diff -urN /usr/ports/audio/solfege/Makefile audio/solfege/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/audio/solfege/Makefile	2009-02-10 03:17:11.000000000 +0900
+++ audio/solfege/Makefile	2009-03-14 21:20:05.000000000 +0900
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	solfege
-PORTVERSION=	3.12.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.14.0
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-nosound
diff -urN /usr/ports/audio/solfege/distinfo audio/solfege/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/audio/solfege/distinfo	2009-02-10 03:17:11.000000000 +0900
+++ audio/solfege/distinfo	2009-03-14 21:39:45.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (solfege-3.12.1.tar.gz) = 8170b62fa2c6e875036f435cc3f8cc4a
-SHA256 (solfege-3.12.1.tar.gz) = 40fb33f3cf91de8fe2b0a9924ed32e2dcb9d07f362c62c7fbea052d25d1ed87a
-SIZE (solfege-3.12.1.tar.gz) = 3497644
+MD5 (solfege-3.14.0.tar.gz) = ce76658c3f6843a6bb1ae6baff190a6a
+SHA256 (solfege-3.14.0.tar.gz) = c4c0653a934406ab9ff260e9c28a9241f915de4e1e952d7172a0946562e69aa3
+SIZE (solfege-3.14.0.tar.gz) = 3777866
diff -urN /usr/ports/audio/solfege/pkg-plist audio/solfege/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/audio/solfege/pkg-plist	2009-02-10 03:17:11.000000000 +0900
+++ audio/solfege/pkg-plist	2009-03-14 21:49:00.000000000 +0900
